positive: A perfectly symmetrical, highly intricate mandala design featuring celestial elements and stylized botanical motifs. Depict luminescent jungle flora intertwined with crescent moons, star constellations, and delicate vine work. The style should emulate a detailed vintage engraved etching or Art Nouveau woodcut, rendered in extreme high contrast black and white linework. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes, perfect symmetry, and detailed cross-hatching, designed to repeat seamlessly on textile fabric.
